gpt-image-1.5 · medium · original prompt

Same prompt, two takes

Each row is one concept. Left = the earlier comparison run; right = the revert run. Same model, same quality, same prompt — the difference is just the model generating twice. Tap any for full size.

Left take 1 (comparison run) · right take 2 (revert run) — identical prompt for glasses and elephant. For the bottles, take 1 had no count (drew 7) and take 2 was fixed to six (5 anger / 1 sadness), so that pair also differs by the count. Note: take-1 images are slightly lower resolution than take-2.
